ddls:
CREATE TABLE "retailers" (
  "retailer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retailer */,
  "retailer_name" TEXT /* Name of the retailer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the retailer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the retailer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the retailer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the retailer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the retailer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the retailer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the retailer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retailer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_methods" (
  "sales_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales method */,
  "sales_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales method */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the state belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the city belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the city */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "retailer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the retailer generating the invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the sale was made */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the sale was made */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the sale was made */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "sales_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales method used */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount */,
  "operating_profit" REAL /* Operating profit */,
  "operating_margin" REAL /* Operating margin */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_sales_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_method_id") REFERENCES sales_methods ("sales_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_retailer_id FOREIGN KEY ("retailer_id") REFERENCES retailers ("retailer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_details" (
  "invoice_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice line */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the line belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount of the line */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the line */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice line was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_details_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sales data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
